message:
feat(scheduler): add targeted wake_worker method to WorkerCoordinator

Add WorkerCoordinator::wake_worker(worker_id) for targeted unparking of
a specific worker thread by ID. Complements the existing wake_one()
round-robin approach — needed when routing pinned local tasks to their
owner worker rather than waking an arbitrary thread.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
